content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed all branch-scoped changes against the requested full-state diff and no correctness/safety issues were found. The reconciliation and classification routing changes align with the contract: terminal findings are reconciled per path, failures and thresholds are idempotent, and non-restart classes are correctly deferred without auto-created follow-ups.

## Amendments

None.
